description_long: This rifle features a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact overall length. The body is constructed primarily from matte black metal and polymer, with a robust, angular design and integrated rails for mounting accessories. The rifle includes a prominent pistol grip, a fixed stock that merges seamlessly with the main body, and a long, slender barrel extending from the front. On top, there is a mounted optical sight, likely a red dot or holographic type, for rapid target acquisition. The magazine is integrated into the rear section, typical of bullpup rifles, and the fore-end is streamlined for ergonomic handling. The overall appearance is tactical and modern, suitable for urban combat or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a fixed stock, integrated sight, and a long barrel, designed for tactical use. The body is angular and robust, with a modern, urban-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bullpup configuration and the magazine placement at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the sight, with the grip and trigger visible below.
